entries.english_translation:
Attribution: Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him)

Scope: (Takathur/ 8)

English translation: Ali ibn al-Hasan al-Abdali said: I heard Abu Abd Allah (peace be upon him) saying [in the supplication after the Ghadir prayer]: "...O Truthful of promise, O He who does not break the promise, O He who is every day in a state of manifestation, if You have perfected Your favor upon us through the allegiance to Your friends (awliya)—those about whom Your servants will be questioned—for You have said: 'Then, on that Day, you shall be questioned about the Naim (the bliss/bounty).'"

Book: Tafsir Ahl al-Bayt (peace be upon them), Vol. 18, p. 366

References: Bihar al-Anwar, Vol. 95, p. 304; Iqbal al-A'mal, p. 477; al-Balad al-Amin, p. 259; Kitab al-Mazar, p. 90; al-Misbah by al-Kaf'ami, p. 683; Misbah al-Mutahajjid, p. 750; Tahdhib al-Ahkam, Vol. 3, p. 145; Nur al-Thaqalayn

entries.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ یَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِیمِ أَیْ عَنِ الْوَلَایَهًِْ وَ الدَّلِیلُ عَلَی ذَلِکَ قَوْلُهُ وَ قِفُوهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ مَسْؤُلُونَ قَالَ عَنِ الْوَلَایَهًِْ.
entries.persian: ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ یَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِیمِ؛ یعنی از ولایت، دلیل بر این مطلب آیه: و نگه داریدشان، باید بازخواست شوند (صافّات/۲۴) یعنی از ولایت بازخواست می‌شود.
entries.book: تفسیر اهل بیت علیهم السلام ج۱۸، ص۳۶۶
entries.references: بحارالأنوار، ج۲۴، ص۵۲/ المناقب، ج۲، ص۱۵۳؛ «بتفاوت»/ القمی، ج۲، ص۴۴۰/ البرهان؛ «بتفاوت»
entries.english_translation:
Attribution: Ali ibn Ibrahim (may Allah have mercy on him)

Scope: (Takathur/ 8)

English translation: "Then, on that Day, you shall be questioned about the bliss (al-na'im)," meaning: about the Wilayah (guardianship/allegiance to the Imams). The proof for this is His saying: "And stop them, for they are to be questioned" (Saffat/24), meaning: they shall be questioned about the Wilayah.

Book: Tafsir Ahl al-Bayt (peace be upon them), Vol. 18, p. 366

References: Bihar al-Anwar, Vol. 24, p. 52; Al-Manaqib, Vol. 2, p. 153 (with variation); Al-Qummi, Vol. 2, p. 440; Al-Burhan (with variation)

entries.arabic: أَنَا عَمَ یَتَساءَلُونَ عَنْ وَلَایَتِی یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهًِْ قَوْلُهُ تَعَالَی ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ یَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِیمِ أَنَا نِعْمَهًُْ اللَّهِ تَعَالَی الَّتِی أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ بِهَا عَلَی خَلْقِهِ.
entries.persian: من کسی هستم که مردم در روز قیامت از یکدیگر از ولایت من سؤال می‌کنند؛ ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ یَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِیمِ؛ من همان نعمت خداوند متعال هستم که به‌واسطه‌ی آن خداوند به به مخلوقاتش نعمت داد.
entries.book: تفسیر اهل بیت علیهم السلام ج۱۸، ص۳۶۶
entries.references: الفضایل، ص۸۴
entries.english_translation:
Attribution: Amir al-Mu'minin (peace be upon him)

Scope: (Takathur/ 8)

English translation: I am the one about whom people will be asked on the Day of Resurrection regarding my Wilayah (guardianship). Regarding His saying, the Exalted: "Then, on that Day, you shall be questioned about the Na'im (bliss/bounty)," I am the bounty of Allah, the Exalted, with which Allah has favored His creation.

Book: Tafsir Ahl al-Bayt (peace be upon them), Vol. 18, p. 366

References: Al-Fada'il, p. 84

entries.arabic: عَنِ الصَّادِق (علیه السلام) ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ یَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِیمِ قَالَ النَّعِیمُ الَّذِی أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَیْکُمْ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ (صلی الله علیه و آله).
entries.persian: عبدالله‌بن‌نجیح یمانی گوید: از امام صادق (علیه السلام) پرسیدم: «معنی آیه‌ی ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ یَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِیمِ؛ چیست»؟ فرمود: «مقصود نعمتی است که خداوند به محمّد (صلی الله علیه و آله) و آل محمّد (علیهم السلام) روزی فرموده است».
entries.book: تفسیر اهل بیت علیهم السلام ج۱۸، ص۳۶۶
entries.references: بحار الانوار، ج۵۳، ص۱۰۷
entries.english_translation:
Attribution: Al-Sadiq (peace be upon him)

Scope: (Takathur/ 8)

English translation: Regarding the verse, "Then, on that day, you shall be questioned about the bounty (al-na'im)," he said: "The bounty is that which God has bestowed upon you through Muhammad and the family of Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family)."

Book: Tafsir Ahl al-Bayt (peace be upon them), vol. 18, p. 366

References: Bihar al-Anwar, vol. 53, p. 107
